channel.title: Stereogum on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Stereogum on smpaget blog

item.title: Dressing up
item.description: Currently people celebrate halloween around this date. this is not something i particularly take part in celebrating but some people who do read this blog will celebrate it. (on a side issue Lynzy is having a dress up as your favourite film charactor party. nice) So what to get dressed as? I understand this is a problem for lots of people. All the key Halloween figures don’t really give room for the modern trendy music loving person. Fortunately Stereogum has a handy list of ten trendy pop star halloween costumes along with links to appropraite part of me thinks this video from Ron Howard is part of a bad halloween project! also what happened to the endless repeats of Happy days during the school holidays? anyway,

item.title: New Bjork Video
item.description:
The fantastic Stereogum, point to the new Bjork video - Wanderlust. it is really good.
I can’t wait to see it on like full screen. (suddenly MTv and sattelite Tv becomes a need rather than a luxuary. but hey give it a day or two and we will see how it goes.
click to see - New Björk Video - “Wanderlust” I also really like Volta. it’s cool. technorati tags - bjork & stereogum
